title: cleistocalyx nicobaricus
intro: Cleistocalyx nicobaricus, a species of plant in the family Myrtaceae, is commonly known as the Nicobar myrtle or Nicobar black pepper tree. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Cleistocalyx nicobaricus include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, cough, and skin infections, as well as its use as a digestive aid. Cleistocalyx nicobaricus is often prepared into herbal remedies, including infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to promote overall well-being.
